'You control target opponent during their next combat/turn' (mind-control of player) is a major engine gap
Waterbend bonus mode (graveyard shuffle + 7 + no max hand size) requires bending + max-hand subsystems

results.engine_gap: 'Would die this turn -> exile instead' replacement effect requires a delayed replacement interceptor; we wire only the damage portion

results.engine_gap: Granting 'firebending 1' as a keyword on the created tokens is engine gap (bending kw)
results.notes: Creates two 2/2 red Soldier tokens via OBJECT_CREATED. Flashback handled separately by engine.

results.engine_gap: Excess-damage -> {R} mana and 'don't lose unspent red mana EOT' are mana-pool subsystem gaps; we wire only the FIGHT
results.notes: Auto-pairs first own creature with first opponent creature; emits FIGHT event.

results.engine_gap: Change target of spell/ability with single target is a stack-rewriting primitive; the additional cost of pay-5-life-or-{2} is gap
Reveal-until-nonland exile + cast-without-paying conditional + flashback are layered exile-and-cast primitives
Granting 'firebending 5' (a bending keyword that adds 5 R on attack) to all your creatures requires bending kw grants
Affinity-for-Allies cost reduction is at cast-time; multi-fight-target is gap. We pick first 2 own creatures vs first opp creature
results.notes: Bespoke: emits damage = power for each of up to 2 attackers to one chosen opp creature.
